step_rationale: Atypical chemokine driving atherosclerosis and plaque inflammation; ischemia-reperfusion mediator.
mechanism: MIF-2 promotes plaque inflammation and atherosclerosis via chemokine and lipogenic signaling.

references.title: An atypical atherogenic chemokine that promotes advanced atherosclerosis and hepatic lipogenesis.
MIF family cytokines in cardiovascular diseases and prospects for precision-based therapeutics.
